issue.message: Overriding method should call `super.onBind`

READ_EXTERNAL_STORAGE is deprecated (and is not granted) when targeting Android 13+. If you need to query or interact with MediaStore or media files on the shared storage, you should instead use one or more new storage permissions: `READ_MEDIA_IMAGES`, `READ_MEDIA_VIDEO` or `READ_MEDIA_AUDIO`.
WRITE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE is deprecated (and is not granted) when targeting Android 13+. If you need to write to shared storage, use the `MediaStore.createWriteRequest` intent.
Field requires API level 23 (current min is 21): `android.provider.Settings#ACTION_REQUEST_IGNORE_BATTERY_OPTIMIZATIONS`
Field requires API level 23 (current min is 21): `android.provider.Settings#ACTION_REQUEST_IGNORE_BATTERY_OPTIMIZATIONS`
Field requires API level 23 (current min is 21): `android.provider.Settings#ACTION_IGNORE_BATTERY_OPTIMIZATION_SETTINGS`
Call requires API level 23 (current min is 21): `android.content.Context#getColor`
Call requires API level 23 (current min is 21): `android.webkit.WebResourceError#getDescription`
Call requires API level 23 (current min is 21): `android.content.Context#getColor`
Call requires API level 23 (current min is 21): `android.content.Context#getColor`
Call requires API level 23 (current min is 21): `android.content.Context#getColor`
Call requires API level 23 (current min is 21): `android.content.Context#getColor`
Call requires API level 23 (current min is 21): `android.content.Context#getSystemService`
Call requires API level 23 (current min is 21): `android.content.Context#getSystemService`
When targeting Android 13 or higher, posting a permission requires holding the `POST_NOTIFICATIONS` permission
When targeting Android 13 or higher, posting a permission requires holding the `POST_NOTIFICATIONS` permission
Not targeting the latest versions of Android; compatibility modes apply. Consider testing and updating this version. Consult the android.os.Build.VERSION_CODES javadoc for details.
Suspicious indentation: This is indented but is not continuing the previous expression (`isRunning = true`...)
Suspicious indentation: This is indented but is not continuing the previous expression (`binding.textError.ba`...)
Suspicious indentation: This is indented but is not continuing the previous expression (`binding.textStatus.b`...)

Must be one or more of: DefaultTsPayloadReaderFactory.FLAG_ALLOW_NON_IDR_KEYFRAMES, DefaultTsPayloadReaderFactory.FLAG_IGNORE_AAC_STREAM, DefaultTsPayloadReaderFactory.FLAG_IGNORE_H264_STREAM, DefaultTsPayloadReaderFactory.FLAG_DETECT_ACCESS_UNITS, DefaultTsPayloadReaderFactory.FLAG_IGNORE_SPLICE_INFO_STREAM, DefaultTsPayloadReaderFactory.FLAG_OVERRIDE_CAPTION_DESCRIPTORS, DefaultTsPayloadReaderFactory.FLAG_ENABLE_HDMV_DTS_AUDIO_STREAMS

Use of `REQUEST_IGNORE_BATTERY_OPTIMIZATIONS` violates the Play Store Content Policy regarding acceptable use cases, as described in https://developer.android.com/training/monitoring-device-state/doze-standby.html

Use of `REQUEST_IGNORE_BATTERY_OPTIMIZATIONS` violates the Play Store Content Policy regarding acceptable use cases, as described in https://developer.android.com/training/monitoring-device-state/doze-standby.html
Requiring Wifi permissions limits app availability on TVs that support only Ethernet
The logging tag can be at most 23 characters, was 24 (MyTsPayloadReaderFactory)
The logging tag can be at most 23 characters, was 24 (MyTsPayloadReaderFactory)
issue.errorLine1: Log.w(TAG, "Using simplified TS extractor - AIT parsing not yet implemented")

Avoid using + in version numbers; can lead to unpredictable and unrepeatable builds (org.jellyfin.media3:media3-ffmpeg-decoder:$media3_version+1)
issue.errorLine1: implementation "org.jellyfin.media3:media3-ffmpeg-decoder:$media3_version+1" // MP2 (MPEG-1/2 Layer II) via Jellyfin FFmpeg

issue.message: This declaration is opt-in and its usage should be marked with `@androidx.media3.common.util.UnstableApi` or `@OptIn(markerClass = androidx.media3.common.util.UnstableApi.class)`

Insecure Base Configuration

`epgReceiver` \ is missing `RECEIVER_EXPORTED` or `RECEIVER_NOT_EXPORTED` flag for unprotected \ broadcasts registered for com.livetv.androidtv.EPG_LOADED, com.livetv.androidtv.EPG_ERROR, com.livetv.androidtv.EPG_STATUS
Very long vector path (904 characters), which is bad for performance. Considering reducing precision, removing minor details or rasterizing vector.
This library supports using KSP instead of kapt, which greatly improves performance. Learn more: https://developer.android.com/studio/build/migrate-to-ksp
Set `android:baselineAligned="false"` on this element for better performance
Possible overdraw: Root element paints background `@color/background_dark` with a theme that also paints a background (inferred theme is `@style/Theme_LiveTV_Settings`)
Possible overdraw: Root element paints background `@color/tv_background` with a theme that also paints a background (inferred theme is `@style/Theme_LiveTV_EPG`)
Possible overdraw: Root element paints background `@color/player_background` with a theme that also paints a background (inferred theme is `@style/Theme_LiveTV_HbbTV`)
Possible overdraw: Root element paints background `@color/tv_background` with a theme that also paints a background (inferred theme is `@style/Theme_LiveTV_Leanback`)

Possible overdraw: Root element paints background `@color/tv_background` with a theme that also paints a background (inferred theme is `@style/Theme_LiveTV_Settings`)
Possible overdraw: Root element paints background `@color/tv_surface` with a theme that also paints a background (inferred theme is `@style/Theme.LiveTV`)
